sections.paragraph:
(“brother,” i.e. “friend of Jehovah”), [Ahiah, Ahijah], pr.n.-

(1) of a certain priest in the time of Saul, 1Sa 14:3, 1Sa 14:8.-(2) 1Ch 8:7.-(3) 1Ch 11:36.-(4) 1Ki 4:3.-(5) 1Ch 26:20.-(6) 1Ch 2:25.-(7) 1Ki 15:27, 33 1Ki 15:33.-(8) Neh 10:27.-(9) a prophet living at Shiloh in the time of Jeroboam, 1Ki 11:29 12:15 called אֲחִיָּהוּ 1Ki 14:6, 18 1Ki 14:18 2Ch 10:15.
